title: HEALTH CARE SERVICES - 211info
text: SOUTH GILLIAM HEALTH CENTER HEALTH CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include annual exams, gynecological exams, care for acute and chronic conditions, pregnancy testing, immunizations, sports physicals, mental health evaluations, and health screenings. 422 N Main Street Condon, OR 97823 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-6pm, Friday 8am-noon Email (541) 384-2061 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 384-2061 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment. Limited walk-in for urgent care. FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Gilliam County Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics General Medical Care Mental Health Evaluation Pap Tests Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: SPECIALTY MEDICINE - GENERAL DENTAL CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOUTH GILLIAM HEALTH CENTER
